outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected; positive GEX across all expiries (1.47B total) indicates dealer stabilization mode with range-bound behavior
outlook.summary: Spot sits just above Monthly Gamma Flip (24071) with massive CALL OI at 24100 creating a structural pivot zone. Bearish skew in 0DTE and Monthly (ratio 1.22-1.26) indicates protective put positioning, but positive total GEX means dealers will suppress volatility. Expect magnetic pull toward 24000 Max Pain with tight range dynamics.

levels.motivazione: Massive 4009 CALL OI in Monthly expiration - dominant strike across all expiries. High 0DTE volume (226) confirms active institutional positioning. Acts as structural pivot below spot.
Monthly gamma equilibrium point - spot proximity indicates regime sensitivity. Breach below flips dealers to short gamma, amplifying downside moves.
CONFLUENCE: Monthly Max Pain coincides with significant PUT OI in 0DTE (122) and Monthly (535). Strong magnetic attraction - dealer target zone.
Dominant 0DTE CALL OI (188) above spot creates intraday resistance. Dealer hedging will accelerate selling pressure if price approaches.
Significant CALL interest across WEEKLY (211 OI) and MONTHLY (87 OI). High 0DTE volume (204) adds intraday relevance. Secondary resistance cluster.
Weekly PUT WALL with 208 OI provides structural support floor. Combined with 23400 PUT (205 OI) creates broad support zone 23300-23400.
